name: Salmon Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch quiche dish or pie plate with pastry; trim excess pastry around edges and flute.
2. Prick the bottom and sides of the quiche shell with a fork.
3. Bake at 425 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes.
4. Combine remaining ingredients, except cheese, stirring well; set aside.
5. Sprinkle half cup cheese into pastry shell.
6. Top with salmon mixture.
7. Bake at 375 degrees for 50 minutes.
8. Sprinkle remaining cheese over quiche and bake 5 additional minutes.
